# SagewayAI
> Daily wisdom digests: parables, philosopher quotes, reflection.

## Main pages
- Home: https://sagewayai.com
- Digest archive: https://sagewayai.com/digests
- Sitemap: https://sagewayai.com/sitemap.xml

## About
SagewayAI publishes a daily wisdom digest: a short parable from world
culture, a quote from a philosopher (Marcus Aurelius, Seneca, Confucius,
and others), a reflection, and a question to ponder. Content is available
in Russian and English. Also available as a Telegram bot @sagewayai_bot.

## Content
All digests are available at /d/[slug]. Each one contains:
- A quote from a sage, with attribution
- A short parable (200-400 words)
- An authored reflection
- A question for personal reflection
